name: code-review-fix
_note: Factory-loop demo (issue -> triage -> fix -> commit). Starts from a published [ai-review] issue on a PR: the triage agent reads the PR's open [ai-review] issue and emits a single-cluster triage; the fix agent proposes the remediation; conclude-fix applies it, commits onto the PR head branch, and closes the issue. Two agent states only (triage -> fix); no review fanout, no preflight. Trigger /fixit on a PR comment so the run is keyed pr-<N> and conclude-fix can resolve the head branch via `gh pr view`. Reuses fix-agent + conclude-fix/_apply_fixes/conclude-triage/_derive_gate and the schemas/checks from code-review-factory; the only new agent is fix-triage-agent.

states.label: propose remediation + commit to the PR
